objective: Plan the System membership, readiness, catch-up, and rebuildable desired-versus-observed topology plane.
falsifiable_claim: Desired deployment never fabricates observed admission, readiness, role, root, watermark, or catch-up truth across admission, drain, removal, restart, and rebuild.
exit_criteria: Admission, catch-up, drain, remove, restart/rebuild, stale-root, foreign-node, and degraded fixtures preserve the desired-versus-observed boundary.
Topology projections rebuild from admitted truth without fabricating readiness.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M2_MEMBERSHIP_READINESS_PLANE_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Exercise foreign node, stale root, forged readiness, skipped catch-up, role-lease replay, degraded posture, drain race, and restart projection-loss fixtures.
remaining_nonclaims: No promotion, automatic failover, consensus, or useful-work distribution.
Node placement grants no product authority and closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
